diagnostics.message: External Docs MUST Be Defined

The API contract MUST include a 'security' section at the root level.: "security" property must be truthy

API MUST have an one-liner #/info/x-summary field containing a brief description.
API MUST reference the URL of the Terms of Service  in #/info/termsOfService.
